scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,next -c magenta,cyan "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,next -c magenta,cyan "npm run start:prod --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
